'''Harralander''' is a resource item.

==Products==
{{Uses material list|Harralander}}

==Journal==
{{Journal entry|
A bitter tasting herb that makes for a poor tea, yet is often used as a morning pick-me-up by people with no tastebuds. It’s useful in crafting certain potions.
}}
